# hetznerrobot_ssh_key (Resource)

Manages an SSH key in the Hetzner Robot account-level key registry. Registered keys can be referenced by fingerprint when activating the rescue system or ordering new servers.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `data` (String) Public key in OpenSSH `authorized_keys` format (e.g. `ssh-ed25519 AAAA...`). The key body is immutable; changing it forces recreate.
- `name` (String) Display name for the key.

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String) Timestamp at which the key was registered.
- `fingerprint` (String) MD5 fingerprint computed by Hetzner. Used as the resource ID.
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `size` (Number) Key size in bits.
- `type` (String) Key algorithm reported by Hetzner (e.g. `ED25519`, `RSA`).
